originalTitle: Get Borderlands 3, Risk of Rain 2 and 13 other great PC games for $15
summary: The aptly-named “2K Megahits 2026 Bundle” from Humble includes 15 Steam games for $15. It’s a smattering of the publisher 2K’s biggest games of the 2010s, including BioShock Infinite, Risk of Rain 2, Borderlands 3, and XCOM: Enemy Unknown. content: The aptly-named “2K Megahits 2026 Bundle” from Humble includes 15 Steam games for $15. It’s a smattering of the publisher 2K’s biggest games of the 2010s, including BioShock Infinite, Risk of Rain 2, Borderlands 3, and XCOM: Enemy Unknown. The bundle will be available until August 7th, though the bundle page notes that keys for some games are already starting to run low. All of the games work on Windows, while some support MacOS and SteamOS. [Product: 2K Megahits 2026 Bundle | https://humblebundleinc.sjv.io/c/482924/2091208/25796?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.humblebundle.com%2Fgames%2F2k-megahits-2026-bundle] One of my personal favorite games, Risk of Rain 2, is included in the bundle. In the third-person roguelike, you’ll face off against increasingly difficult waves of enemies, fighting to stay alive as long as you can and collecting power-ups and useful perks before extracting to the next zone to do it all again. It’s just challenging enough to make victory satisfying, and fun to play alone or with friends. You also get 2012’s XCOM: Enemy Unknown, a legendary turn-based strategy game that’s usually $15 on its own, to give you a sense of the bundle’s value. The bundle also notably includes three games from the Borderlands universe. Borderlands 3 Special Edition is a traditional looter-shooter FPS, Tiny Tina’s Wonderlands adds RPG elements like an overworld map and spellcasting, and Tales from the Borderlands is an interactive episodic visual novel from Telltale Games. You’ll also get a variety of shooters, including BioShock Infinite, Duke Nukem 3D, Bulletstorm, plus Hidden and Dangerous from the turn of the millenium. Part of the proceeds from the bundle benefit Covenant House, an organization that benefits young people facing homelessness, as well as the publisher and Humble. You can adjust how you pledge is split between the beneficiaries by clicking the button that says “adjust donation” under the checkout button. You can find the full list of games in the bundle below: * Risk of Rain 2 * Borderlands 3 Standard Edition * Mafia II: Definitive Edition * BioShock Infinite * Tiny Tina’s Wonderlands * The Quarry * Tribes of Midgard Deluxe Edition * Homeworld Remastered Collection * Tales from the Borderlands * Bulletstorm Full Clip Edition * Duke Nukem 3D: 20th Anniversary World Tour * Hidden and Dangerous Bundle * The Darkness II * X-COM: UFO Defense * XCOM Enemy Unknown
chineseTitle: 只需 15 美元即可购买《无主之地 3》、《Risk of Rain 2》和其他 13 款精彩 PC 游戏
chineseSummary: Humble 推出的“2K Megahits 2026 Bundle”恰如其名，包含 15 款 Steam 游戏，售价 15 美元。这是 2K 发行商 2010 年代最热门游戏的一小部分，包括《生化奇兵：无限》、《雨中冒险 2》、《无主之地 3》和《幽浮：未知敌人》。该捆绑包将持续到 8 月 7 日，尽管捆绑包页面指出 [...]
chineseContent: Humble 推出的“2K Megahits 2026 Bundle”恰如其名，包含 15 款 Steam 游戏，售价 15 美元。这是 2K 发行商 2010 年代最热门游戏的一小部分，包括《生化奇兵：无限》、《雨中冒险 2》、《无主之地 3》和《幽浮：未知敌人》。该捆绑包将持续到 8 月 7 日，不过捆绑包页面指出，某些游戏的密钥已经开始短缺。所有游戏均可在 Windows 上运行，部分游戏支持 MacOS 和 SteamOS。 [产品：2K Megahits 2026 捆绑包 | https://humblebundleinc.sjv.io/c/482924/2091208/25796?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.humblebundle.com%2Fgames%2F2k-megahits-2026-bundle] 我个人最喜欢的游戏之一《Risk of Rain 2》包含在捆绑包中。在第三人称 Roguelike 游戏中，你将面对越来越难对付的敌人，尽可能长时间地生存下去，并收集能量和有用的福利，然后撤离到下一个区域再次进行这一切。它的挑战性足以使胜利令人满意，并且单独或与朋友一起玩很有趣。您还可以获得 2012 年的 XCOM：未知敌人，这是一款传奇的回合制策略游戏，通常单独售价 15 美元，让您了解捆绑包的价值。该捆绑包还特别包含来自《无主之地》宇宙的三款游戏。 《无主之地 3》特别版是一款传统的掠夺射击游戏，《Tiny Tina’s Wonderlands》添加了世界地图和施法等 RPG 元素，《无主之地传说》是 Telltale Games 出品的互动情景视觉小说。您还可以获得各种射击游戏，包括《生化奇兵：无限》、《毁灭公爵 3D》、《子弹风暴》以及世纪之交的《隐藏与危险》。该捆绑包的部分收益将捐献给 Covenant House（一个为无家可归的年轻人提供帮助的组织）以及出版商和 Humble
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
